original_image_tags: A single sheet of aged, light-blue graph paper filled with handwritten text in pencil. The text is arranged in rows of what appears to be a substitution cipher or coded message, with numerical keys written above some of the letter groups. The paper shows signs of age with slight yellowing and a few small stains.

elements.description: A handwritten document on grid paper featuring five rows of an encoded or ciphered message. Each row contains a series of capitalized words (such as 'DI TER', 'TIRED', 'LASOR', 'SOLAR', 'MARTIANS') accompanied by sequences of numbers above or below them. A handwritten signature and the date '7/17/52' are visible at the bottom left.

judge.reason: Description B invents specific quoted text ('DI TER', 'TIRED', etc.) and details (signature, date '7/17/52') not mentioned in Description A, and both quote the same visual element (the encoded message) but with contradictory verbatim content.
